name: Duck Michael Gelman
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Sweet cherries in syrup (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the duck with salt and pepper.
2. Place the duck in a baking pan.
3. Mix the orange marmalade with the frozen orange juice concentrate.
4. Pour the mixture over the duck.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes per pound.
6. During the last half hour of cooking, raise the temperature to 425°F and baste every 10 minutes with pan juices.
7. To make the sauce: Puree the cherries in a processor. Place the puree in a saucepan with red wine, brown sugar, and cornstarch. Simmer until thick and serve over the duck.
